---
title: New tools for internationally-scalable future-proof transport planning
abstract: An overview of open and future-proof transport planning methods, communities of practice, and case studies including NPT (Scotland), PCT (England/Wales) and international adaptations, with links to exposure-aware routing and multi-city analysis.
date: 2025-10-22
author:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---
This talk highlights scalable, open transport planning tools and opportunities to align with GREENTRAVEL, including reproducible research practices and international portability.
